<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# viewer

Client components for rendering investor pitch documents with synchronized navigation, section tracking, and interactive Q&A. Delegates chunk rendering to specialized components based on chunk_type, integrates TOC sidebar and floating input for navigation and querying.

## Contents

### Layout & Orchestration

- [pitch-viewer.tsx](./pitch-viewer.tsx) — PitchViewer orchestrates main viewer interface: fetches pitch data from `@/lib/pitch-api`, manages `activeId` from `useActiveSection()`, controls `tocOpen`/`tocCollapsed`/`qaOpen` states, implements `scrollToSection(id)` with 56px header offset and 2s highlight animation, renders TOCSidebar/DocumentGroup/FloatingInput/QAPanel with responsive layouts.

- [document-group.tsx](./document-group.tsx) — DocumentGroup maps `document.chunks` to SectionCard instances, renders `document.title` as h2 heading, propagates `onInView` callbacks for section tracking.

- [section-card.tsx](./section-card.tsx) — SectionCard wraps PitchChunk with intersection observer (threshold: 0, rootMargin: "-56px 0px 0px 0px"), delegates to HeadingSection/ImageCaptionSection/TableSection/TextSection based on `chunk.chunk_type`, triggers `onInView(id, inView)` callback.

### Navigation Components

- [toc-sidebar.tsx](./toc-sidebar.tsx) — TOCSidebar renders collapsible document navigation: desktop sticky sidebar (60/10 width toggle), mobile Sheet drawer, filters chunks by `section_number != null`, applies `bg-accent border-l-2 border-primary` to active chunk, truncates non-heading content to 50 chars.

- [floating-input.tsx](./floating-input.tsx) — FloatingInput renders fixed bottom-6 Q&A input: dynamic centering via `calc(${contentLeft} + (100% - ${contentLeft}) / 2)`, max-width `min(560px, calc(100%-2rem))`, placeholder `"Ask about ${sectionName}..."` or `"Ask anything about this pitch..."`, Enter submits trimmed question, `transition-[left] duration-200` for sidebar transitions.

### Section Renderers

- [heading-section.tsx](./heading-section.tsx) — HeadingSection renders h2 with `section-${id}` anchor, 2xl semibold text, bottom separator line.

- [text-section.tsx](./text-section.tsx) — TextSection renders Markdown content with `react-markdown` + `remark-gfm`, applies `prose prose-neutral max-w-none` styling.

- [table-section.tsx](./table-section.tsx) — TableSection attempts `parseTableContent(content)` from `@/lib/parse-table-content`, renders MetricCard grid (1/2/3 cols at sm/md/lg) if parseable, falls back to `ReactMarkdown` with `remarkGfm` for non-conforming tables.

- [metric-card.tsx](./metric-card.tsx) — MetricCard displays label/value/subLabel in muted background card: value at 32px semibold, muted-foreground labels, leading-tight line-height.

- [image-caption-section.tsx](./image-caption-section.tsx) — ImageCaptionSection renders Card with ImageIcon (from lucide-react) and italic muted-foreground caption text.

## Dependencies

### Internal Modules
- `@/lib/pitch-api` — `fetchPitch()`, `PitchDocument`, `PitchChunk` types
- `@/lib/parse-table-content` — `parseTableContent()` for metric grid parsing
- `@/hooks/use-active-section` — intersection observer hook for `activeId` tracking
- `@/components/qa/qa-panel` — Q&A interaction panel
- `@/components/ui/*` — shadcn/ui primitives (Card, Button, Input, Skeleton, Sheet, ScrollArea)

### External Libraries
- `react-markdown` — Markdown renderer
- `remark-gfm` — GitHub Flavored Markdown plugin
- `react-intersection-observer` — section visibility tracking
- `lucide-react` — ImageIcon, PanelLeftClose, PanelLeftOpen icons

## UI Behavioral Contracts

### Scroll & Navigation
- **Header offset**: `56px` (`56 + 16` for scroll offset in `scrollToSection`)
- **Highlight animation**: `ring-2 ring-primary/30` for 2000ms on section navigation
- **Intersection observer rootMargin**: `"-56px 0px 0px 0px"` (compensates for sticky header)
- **Intersection observer threshold**: `0` (triggers at first pixel)

### Layout Dimensions
- **TOC sidebar expanded**: `60` (width unit), `h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]`
- **TOC sidebar collapsed**: `10` (width unit)
- **Header height**: `h-14` (56px), sticky at `top-0 z-40`
- **Floating input max-width**: `min(560px, calc(100%-2rem))`
- **Floating input positioning**: `bottom-6 z-50`, centered via `left: calc(${contentLeft} + (100% - ${contentLeft}) / 2)` with `-translate-x-1/2`
- **Main content QA offset**: `lg:pr-[460px]` when `qaOpen` is true

### Responsive Breakpoints
- **TOC mobile/desktop**: `lg` breakpoint toggles between Sheet drawer and sticky sidebar
- **Metric grid columns**: 1 col default, 2 at `sm`, 3 at `lg`

### Text Truncation
- **TOC non-heading content**: 50 characters

### Transitions
- **Sidebar width transition**: `transition-[left] duration-200`

## File Relationships

- **pitch-viewer.tsx** imports: document-group, toc-sidebar, floating-input, QAPanel (from `@/components/qa/qa-panel`), useActiveSection hook, fetchPitch API
- **document-group.tsx** imports: section-card
- **section-card.tsx** imports: heading-section, image-caption-section, table-section, text-section, uses `react-intersection-observer`
- **table-section.tsx** imports: metric-card, parseTableContent utility, ReactMarkdown
- **toc-sidebar.tsx** imports: shadcn/ui Sheet/Button/ScrollArea components
